response: TEXT IS A MACHINE LEARNING ALGORITHM USED FOR CLASSIFICATION TASKS. IT IS BASED ON THE GAUSSIAN DISTRIBUTION ASSUMPTION AND USES NAIVE BAYES THEOREM. THE DATA SET USED IS THE LOAD DIGITS DATASET FROM SCIKIT-LEARN, WHICH CONTAINS 8x8 GRAY SCALE IMAGES.
